author: maxine-at-forecast--noether--fuzz-ci
content: Decision: T2+T3 combined — removed continue-on-error from all fuzz steps so crashes fail CI. Increased regular CI fuzz from 30s to 60s per target, and now running all 6 existing targets (was only 3). Created fuzz-nightly.yml with schedule cron (3 AM UTC daily) running all targets including new ones for 300s each via matrix strategy. Nightly uses fail-fast: false so one crashing target doesn't prevent others from running.
